{{Infobox character
| name = Swarm-Queen
| aliases = Swarm Queen
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = Swarm-Queen
| abilities = restrict magic to a ship
| affiliations = D'Niss
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Swarm-Queen Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Esh’kinaar]], known as the Swarm-[[Queen]], is a colossal entity of the [[D’Niss]] species. Described as being the size of a planet, she possesses immense power and is viewed by her insectoid followers as both a ruler and a deity. The [[D’Niss]] exist to serve her, and they consider all other sentient [[life]] to be subordinate to them. The Swarm-[[Queen]] is a massive consumer of energy, capable of feeding on the corona of stars. Physically, she features rainbow-colored wings, a carapace, and four bladed arms. In combat, she can utilize mental attacks to weaken opponents and release millions of rainbow-colored orbs. While she was previously thought to be contained by the [[Titan Knights]], she eventually ascended into the local dimension. Following her defeat, it was noted that she possessed the ability to produce a successor, as she gave birth to a new Swarm-[[Queen]].}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Swarm-Queen]] is the leader of giant extra-dimensional insects.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Swarm-Queen]] is part of the D'Niss.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Swarm-Queen]] is a figure mentioned in comparison to [[Starhammer]]'s rule.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|No army could stand against the Swarm [[Queen]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c24">''The Engineer'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] holds the title of the Swarm-[[Queen]], a powerful entity feared by the crew of [[The Last Horizon]] and encountered by [[Aelora]] and [[Javik Leed]]. Summoned by the intense [[Aether]] in the [[Visiria system]], this being possesses four bladed arms and rainbow wings, similar to those found on its locust soldiers. The Swarm-[[Queen]] is a threat capable of being released upon the galaxy through ritual, and it has the ability to restrict magic within a ship. After spraying millions of rainbow-colored orbs into space, the entity focused on a chant before its death. [[Esh’kinaar]] gave birth to a new Swarm-[[Queen]], a black [[D’Niss]] clone with shadow wings and an insectoid head that serves as a portal to a dimension of darkness. This newborn was struck by an [[emerald]] salvo and subsequently cleaved and burned by [[Raion]]'s attack, causing its remaining half to collapse into a shining white ball.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] is the title of [[Esh’kinaar]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] is a being that [[Aelora]] and [[Javik Leed]] faced.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] is an entity that the crew of [[The Last Horizon]] fears.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Aether]] in the [[Visiria system]] was strong enough to summon the [[Swarm-Queen]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] is a powerful entity described as being beyond [[Felrex]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38">''The Knight'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] is a threat that can be released upon the galaxy via ritual.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] can restrict magic to a ship.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The locust soldiers have smaller versions of the [[Swarm-Queen]]’s rainbow wings.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] has four bladed arms.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] has rainbow wings.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] sprayed millions of rainbow-colored orbs into space.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] focused on a chant before dying.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Esh’kinaar]] gave birth to a new [[Swarm-Queen]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The new [[Swarm-Queen]] is a black [[D’Niss]] clone of [[Esh’kinaar]] with four bladed arms and wings of shadow.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The new [[Swarm-Queen]]'s head is like an insectoid portal onto a dimension of darkness.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] is a newborn alien with an [[emerald]] salvo of shots impacting its carapace.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Swarm-Queen]] was cleaved and burned by [[Raion]]'s attack.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The remaining half of the [[Swarm-Queen]] collapsed into a shining white ball.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Blade]] shredded shields faster than the [[Swarm-Queen]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Swarm [[Queen]] is a being that can be defeated to beat the spirit of a single world.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"Until I know that I’m not abandoning my crew to the mercies of the Swarm-Queen, I can’t leave the ship."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:D’Niss]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Aliens]]
